purpose: Lightweight baseline inventory for the 10-round governance workflow before expensive full-repository gates run.

aiflowTasks.title: Baseline production adoption inventory
aiflowTasks.objective: Plan the fifth aiflow-driven 10-round governance batch around production adoption closure, adopter evidence, and no-runtime-state commits.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Machine-readable R5 boundary inventory with active batch, task map, surfaces, ignored runtime paths, timeout policy, and baseline gates.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after the boundary inventory gate passes

aiflowTasks.title: Release evidence drift closure
aiflowTasks.objective: Deepen release evidence consumption and required-check drift evidence for adopter release decisions.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Release evidence or dashboard contract update linking checksums, SBOM, provenance, Docker digest, and rollback notes.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after release evidence and governance-report checks pass

aiflowTasks.title: Generator adoption proof
aiflowTasks.objective: Extend generated compatibility rehearsal from deterministic fixtures to adopter-facing upgrade proof.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Dry-run diff, generated matrix, rollback note, and dependency boundary evidence remain indexed.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after generated compatibility and upgrade dry-run gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: CLI troubleshooting adoption
aiflowTasks.objective: Close CLI DX support-bundle adoption loop for doctor, release check, generated failure reports, and aiflow remediation handoff.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Docs and machine contract show next action, redaction, and no-aiflow-commit policy.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after CLI DX and support-bundle gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: REST adoption contracts
aiflowTasks.objective: Deepen REST/OpenAPI/validation/error-envelope adopter proof with invalid request smoke, generated service schema alignment, and middleware example discoverability.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: REST adopter contract evidence that keeps invalid request envelopes, OpenAPI schemas, and examples aligned.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after OpenAPI, validation, and API example gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: RPC adoption contracts
aiflowTasks.objective: Deepen RPC Tier-1 adoption proof across unary and stream evidence, resolver and balancer behavior, gRPC compatibility, and Kitex coexistence rollback notes.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: RPC adopter contract evidence that distinguishes Tier 1-ready, candidate, and report-only surfaces.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC boundary and benchmark evidence gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Plugin publishing adoption
aiflowTasks.objective: Turn plugin protocol evidence into adopter-facing publishing guidance with conformance report, digest/signature, permission, compatibility, and failure isolation proof.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Plugin publishing adoption evidence with conformance JSON and operator rollback notes.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after plugin conformance and publishing evidence gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Cloud-native adoption proof
aiflowTasks.objective: Close cloud-native adopter proof across Helm schema, Kustomize overlays, ServiceMonitor, HPA, PDB, NetworkPolicy, fallback reporting, and production checklist links.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Cloud-native adoption evidence that separates real rendering from fallback status and links production checklist actions.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after cloud-native render and policy conformance gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Performance adoption ratchet
aiflowTasks.objective: Promote performance evidence into adopter-facing budgets with clear allocation blocking, latency report-only boundaries, trend evidence, and rollback guidance.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Performance adoption ratchet evidence with budget status, trend proof, and rollback guidance.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after benchmark regression and evidence gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Convergence evidence report
aiflowTasks.objective: Run final R5 convergence, record per-round commits, update governance convergence evidence, verify ignored runtime paths, and document environment-limited downgrades.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Final R5 convergence report with per-round commit evidence, dashboard fields, known risks, skipped gates, and next-round recommendations.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after convergence gate passes or environment-limited failures are documented

timeoutPolicy.fallback: Use governance-boundary-inventory-check for Round 01 evidence before running full go test ./...
